articles.title: Maryland, Iowa, and Kentucky propose legislation to establish Bitcoin reserves
articles.description: Lawmakers in Maryland, Iowa, and Kentucky have introduced legislation proposing the creation of Bitcoin (BTC) strategic reserves in their respective states. The latest bills bring the number of US states considering Bitcoin reserves to 17. The proposals aim to integrate Bitcoin into state financial strategies. Kentucky House Bill 376, introduced by Representative TJ Roberts, aims […] The post...

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Primed To Skyrocket 171% This Year, Predict VanEck Analysts – Here’s Why
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) rival Solana (SOL) could skyrocket to $520 by the end of 2025, according to analysts at the asset management firm VanEck. With SOL trading at $191.43 at time of writing, that would represent an increase of more than 171%. VanEck crypto researchers Matthew Sigel and Patrick Bush base their prediction on Solana’s projected […] The post Solana (SOL) Primed To Skyrocket 171% This Year, Predict VanEck Analysts – Here’s Why appeared first on The Daily Hodl.

articles.title: XRP and Solana race toward the next crypto ETF approval
articles.description: Both Solana and XRP have growing ETF applications, regulatory challenges and a fight for institutional acceptance. Who has the edge?

articles.title: Ethereum’s Pectra Upgrade—New All-Time High Incoming?
articles.description: The recent Pectra Upgrade of Ethereum has generated significant excitement within the cryptocurrency community, leading many to speculate that this development could pave the way for a new all-time high in the price of Ethereum. articles.title: SEC Signals Shift: Grayscale’s Solana & Litecoin ETFs Move Forward
articles.description: The SEC has acknowledged Grayscale’s Solana and Litecoin ETF filings, marking a key step that could signal a shift in crypto regulations.
